layout.title: ClubSOS
layout.description: Your comprehensive medical platform. Manage appointments, benefits, and your family group securely.
layout.feature1Desc: Manage your appointments, prescriptions, and medical documents quickly and securely from your device.
layout.feature2Desc: Access a wide network of certified specialists and clinics with guaranteed quality.
layout.feature3Desc: Our medical and administrative support team is always available for you in case of any emergency.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Welcome back to Club SOS Medical
login.phoneError: Please enter a valid phone number (at least 8 digits).

footer.copyright: Club SOS Medical. All rights reserved.

helpModal.title: Help Center
helpModal.desc: If you need assistance, please reach out to our support team through any of the following channels:

signup.step1Subtitle: Select your role on the platform
signup.titularDesc: I am an employee of an SOS Medical affiliated company.
signup.familiarDesc: A primary account member invited me to the platform.
signup.step2Subtitle: Enter the unique code provided by your company or primary member.
signup.step3Subtitle: To link you as a family member, we need to identify your primary member.
signup.titularNamePlaceholder: Exactly as it appears on their ID
signup.titularFoundDesc: The member exists in the company and is active.
signup.step4Subtitle: We will use this WhatsApp number to send appointment alerts and as your main login.
signup.step5Subtitle: Almost done. Enter your personal details and access credentials.
signup.phoneError: Please enter a valid phone number (at least 8 digits).
signup.credentialsHint: Your username is generated automatically from your name and date of birth, but you can change it to whatever you prefer. Choose a password you'll remember easily.
signup.usernameHint: No spaces allowed. Feel free to change it.

reportes.subtitle: Export your company data in Excel or CSV format.
reportes.sectionUsuariosSubtitle: Users registered in the selected period.
reportes.sectionCitasSubtitle: Appointments scheduled by service or by primary member in the selected period.
reportes.sectionContratosSubtitle: Appointments made under service contracts in the selected period.
reportes.sectionUsuariosDesc: Includes name, email, phone, role, account type, status and registration date. Use the period filter to narrow the registration date range.
reportes.sectionCitasDesc: Grouped by service (total appointments per consultation type) or by primary member (own appointments plus family appointments). The filter applies to the appointment date, not the creation date.
reportes.sectionContratosDesc: Only includes appointments linked to a service contract. Groups by contract-service (configured quota vs. appointments used) or by primary member. Select the start date for the period to analyze.

reportes.subtitulo: Global analytics across the entire platform
reportes.sin_datos: No data available for the selected period.
reportes.top_10_note: Showing top 10 companies by member count.
reportes.desc_citas: Platform-wide appointment analytics: totals, confirmed, cancelled and approval rate. Charts by month, status, service and doctor. Filter by company and date range.
reportes.desc_usuarios: Registered user summary: active, inactive and pending activation. Distribution by account type and company. Monthly new registration trend.
reportes.desc_empresas: Global overview of affiliated companies: active, inactive and with appointment auto-confirm. Comparison table with total members, appointments and documents per company. No additional filters.
reportes.desc_documentos: Medical documents uploaded to the platform: totals and distribution by type (lab, radiology, prescription, other). Filter by company and upload date range.
reportes.desc_beneficios: Benefits and promotions published on the platform: active vs. expired, distribution by type and company reach. No additional filters available.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the platform.
terms.s1Body: By registering and using ClubSOS, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you disagree with any of them, you must refrain from using the platform.
terms.s2Body: ClubSOS is a digital medical membership platform operated by SOS Medical that allows users to manage appointments, medical documents and benefits associated with their affiliated company. Access to the platform is conditioned on the user belonging to a registered company with an active account.
terms.s3Body: The user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their access credentials. It is prohibited to share your account with third parties, use the platform for unlawful purposes, or impersonate another person. SOS Medical reserves the right to suspend accounts that violate these conditions.
terms.s4Body: ClubSOS facilitates the management of medical appointments but does not provide direct medical services. The platform should not be used in medical emergencies; in that case, contact local emergency services. SOS Medical does not guarantee uninterrupted service availability and may carry out scheduled maintenance.
terms.s5Body: All content, trademarks, logos and elements of the platform are the property of SOS Medical or its licensors. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution or use is prohibited.
terms.s6Body: SOS Medical may modify these terms at any time. We will notify you through the platform of significant changes. Continued use of ClubSOS after changes are published implies acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s7Body: For inquiries related to these terms, write to us at desarrollo@sosmedical.com.ni or contact us via WhatsApp at +505 8100 1226.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains how we collect and use your information.
privacy.s1Body: SOS Medical, based in Nicaragua, is the data controller for the personal data you provide when using ClubSOS. You can contact us at desarrollo@sosmedical.com.ni.
privacy.s2Body: We collect the data you provide when registering (full name, phone number, email address, national ID) and data generated through platform use (appointment history, uploaded medical documents, benefit interactions). We do not collect payment data directly.
privacy.s3Body: We use your data to manage your membership, process medical appointments, send relevant WhatsApp notifications and generate aggregated reports for your affiliated company. We do not use your data for third-party advertising purposes.
privacy.s4Body: Your data may be accessed by your affiliated company's administrator (empresa_admin) solely for corporate membership management. Appointment data is shared with contracted medical service providers. We do not sell your information to third parties.
privacy.s5Body: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your information, including encryption in transit and role-based access control. However, no system is completely infallible.
privacy.s6Body: You have the right to access, correct or request deletion of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at desarrollo@sosmedical.com.ni. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
privacy.s7Body: We retain your data while your membership is active and for the period required by applicable Nicaraguan law. After cancellation, data will be anonymized or deleted as appropriate.
